iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 19 (stable). Day 20 08:00 - . No nuclear test. 440kg 60% HEU under IAEA monitoring. Natanz destroyed (Mar 2). No enrichment to weapons grade detected. Araghchi rejects ceasefire. Trump contradictory rhetoric: "want a deal" vs "all leaders dead." No diplomatic path. US-Israel strikes on Tehran intensifying — no change to nuclear calculus yet.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 100 (stable). Day 20 08:00 - . US jets now targeting Kharg Island oil hub — major escalation of oil infrastructure strikes. Iran threatens USS Gerald Ford carrier group logistics in Red Sea. UAE reopens airspace (minor de-escalation). Oil exports down 60%. State Dept cable directs all US diplomats to push global coalition against Iran by Friday. Trump allies reject Hormuz coalition. 2,000+ total ME deaths. Iran casualties 1,444+ killed / 18,551+ injured. Brent ~$103, climbing.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 69 (stable). Day 20 08:00 - . Israel announces "limited and targeted ground operations" in southern Lebanon — continues. Simultaneous "extensive strikes" on Tehran AND Beirut — unprecedented dual-front attack. 850+ killed in Lebanon. 1M+ displaced. Israel Katz: displaced "will not return until Israeli citizens safe." Expert: Israel ramping pressure for Hezbollah disarmament; if fails, large-scale invasion likely. UK allies "gravely concerned."

turkey.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 27 (stable). Day 20 08:00 - . No new missile intercepts this cycle. 3 Iranian missiles previously intercepted over Turkey (Incirlik, Kurecik radar). NATO considering Patriot PAC-3 upgrade. Iran denies targeting Turkey. Iranian refugees flooding in. US threatens Iran carrier group — could trigger new Turkish exposure if Red Sea escalates.

india.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 16 (stable). Day 20 07:00 - . India evacuating nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. No direct escalation signals. Pakistan-Afghanistan war ongoing next door.

russia.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 15 (stable). Day 20 07:00 - . Russia continues arms support to Iran. Gerasimov: 12 settlements captured, "offensive in all directions." Ukraine peace talks frozen. No new escalation signals. Missile intercepts over Turkey add NATO-Russia tension.

china.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 7 (stable). Day 20 07:00 - . PLA flights around Taiwan returned to normal levels (26 warplanes + 7 vessels). Trump delays China visit "month or so" — Xi summit shelved. Taiwan $42B defense budget. US-China trade talks stalled. No blockade rehearsal detected this cycle.

north_korea.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 2 (down). Day 20 - . No provocations in 72h. DPRK parliamentary elections Mar 16 (rubber-stamp). No missile tests, no nuclear activity. Extended quiet period.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 46 (stable). Day 20 07:00 - . Gerasimov: 12 settlements captured, offensive "in all directions." Ukraine strikes S-400 + radar in Crimea. 250 Ukrainian drones on Moscow. Russia recruiting Africans. Peace talks dead — frozen by Iran war. Zelensky: Ukraine wants to help with ME drones for money/tech.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 - DETERRENT 60 (stable). Day 20 07:00 - . Kabul hospital strike aftermath: 400+ killed, NYT confirms 75+ civilians from separate strikes, 115,000 displaced. Both sides vow escalation. UNSC condemned Afghan terrorism. China special envoy mediating with no result. Fighting enters 3rd week. No ceasefire in sight.

new: china: china_reduced_flights removed (was -3, flights now normal)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 20 08:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all primary theaters. Iran conventional: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group. Israel-Lebanon: simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut, ground ops continue. No ceasefire in ANY theater. Only minor signal: UAE reopens airspace. Oil exports down 60%.

latest_news.headline: US jets target Iran's Kharg Island oil hub
latest_news.text: US jets strike Kharg Island oil hub — major escalation targeting Iran's primary oil export facility. Second major oil target after earlier strikes.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens USS Gerald Ford carrier group
latest_news.text: Iran military spokesperson warns USS Gerald Ford carrier group in Red Sea "is considered a threat" — logistics and service centers "are considered targets." Direct threat to US carrier.

latest_news.headline: Israel launches "extensive simultaneous strikes" on Tehran AND Beirut
latest_news.text: IDF announces simultaneous waves of "extensive strikes" targeting Iranian regime infrastructure in Tehran AND Hezbollah infrastructure in Beirut. Unprecedented dual-front attack.

latest_news.headline: Israel announces "limited ground operations" in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israel announces "limited and targeted ground operations" against Hezbollah strongholds. Experts warn: if disarmament talks fail, large-scale invasion likely. Residents displaced "until Israel feels secure."

latest_news.headline: US diplomats worldwide ordered to push coalition against Iran by Friday
latest_news.text: State Dept cable to all diplomatic posts: tell foreign governments they "must move expeditiously to diminish capabilities of Iran." Deadline: Friday. Coalition effort largely rejected by allies.

latest_news.headline: Gulf oil exports down 60%, Brent climbing
latest_news.text: Daily Gulf oil exports down 60% minimum. 350+ tankers stranded at Hormuz. Brent ~$103+, Guardian warns could pass 2008 record of $147.50.

latest_news.headline: UAE reopens airspace after Iran attack
latest_news.text: UAE reopens airspace after temporary closure due to Iranian drone/missile strikes. Dubai fire contained. Minor de-escalation signal.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20 08:00) — Global war probability 100%. Day 20 of Iran war. US escalates: Kharg Island oil hub struck, USS Ford carrier group threatened by Iran. Israel runs unprecedented simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut. "Limited" ground ops in Lebanon continue — experts warn large-scale invasion if disarmament talks fail. Gulf oil exports down 60%. Trump coalition effort failing — allies reject Hormuz. Russia-Ukraine offensive ongoing. Pakistan-Afghanistan: no ceasefire. DPRK: extended quiet (72h+). Zero de-escalation in primary theaters. Brent climbing.
